candidates.label: Nano pi-server overview-card Candidate
candidates.responseText: I've analyzed the generated thumbnail for your service overview card, and it aligns well with the request for a modern enterprise aesthetic, utilizing a dark palette and distinct cyan lighting. However, there is a minor hallucination that breaks the requested reality anchor; one server is physically projecting outward from the rack rather than remaining flush. I will regenerate the image to ensure all hardware maintains an authentic, static form factor within the cabinet.

candidates.label: Nano pi-server overview-card Candidate
candidates.notes: Global Pro-model visual upgrade. STRICT REQUIREMENT: NO EMBEDDED TEXT, NO SLOGANS, NO LOGOS, NO UI ELEMENTS.

candidates.label: Nano pi-server overview-card Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "service overview card thumbnail",
  "goal": "Sleek, dark server rack with glowing indicator lights, emphasizing enterprise-grade data infrastructure. THE IMAGE MUST BE COMPLETELY FREE OF ANY EMBEDDED TEXT, SLOGANS, LOGOS, BUTTONS, OR WEBSITE UI ELEMENTS.",
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "85mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "light_source": "dark room, relying on equipment LEDs"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "repeating horizontal lines of server blades",
    "shallow focus on one specific blinking node"
  ],
  "color_restriction": "pitch black, metallic silver, intense cyan and blue LED indicators.",
  "material_notes": [
    "perforated metal server bezels",
    "fiber optic cable hints"
  ],
  "scene": "High-density enterprise server rack processing massive amounts of industrial plant data.",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "authentic server rack form factor",
    "enterprise-grade hardware",
    "data center aesthetic"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "3:2",
    "focal_structure": "tight, abstract pattern of data hardware"
  },
  "avoid": [
    "retro 90s servers",
    "messy ethernet cables",
    "red warning lights",
    "embedded text",
    "slogans",
    "logos",
    "buttons",
    "CTA elements",
    "website UI overlays",
    "graphic design artifacts",
    "watermarks",
    "HUD decorations on screens",
    "fake headlines"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Global Pro-model visual upgrade. STRICT REQUIREMENT: NO EMBEDDED TEXT, NO SLOGANS, NO LOGOS, NO UI ELEMENTS.
